defaults.line: Enter your province, or enter a former Hello Weather location code.

menu.line: This is the {telephone_service_name}. {language_options}, or press star for your NOAA Geophysical Alert Message.
Enter your province, or enter a former Hello Weather location code.
1 for English. 2 for French. 3 for Spanish.
Enter your province, or enter a former Hello Weather location code.
Enter your location number. Press star to search for a location.
Location search is not available yet.

You have reached {location}. 1 for regional observations, 2 for your 7 day outlook, 3 for air quality indices, 4 for the climate summary, 5 for the thunderstorm outlook, 6 for specialty products, or 0 to listen to a corresponding, 10 minute {radio_service_name} broadcast.
You have reached {location}. 1 for regional observations, 2 for your 7 day outlook, 3 for air quality indices, 4 for the climate summary, 5 for the thunderstorm outlook, or 6 for specialty products.

{location} has {alert_count_phrase} in effect. Please press the asterisk key, or 1 for regional observations, 2 for your 7 day outlook, 3 for air quality indices, 4 for the climate summary, 5 for the thunderstorm outlook, 6 for specialty products, or 0 to listen to a corresponding, 10 minute {radio_service_name} broadcast.

{location} has {alert_count_phrase} in effect. Please press the asterisk key, or 1 for regional observations, 2 for your 7 day outlook, 3 for air quality indices, 4 for the climate summary, 5 for the thunderstorm outlook, or 6 for specialty products.
Specialty products. 1 for river conditions, 2 for recent precipitation analysis, 3 for coastal flooding risk, or 4 for hurricane track information. Press pound to return to the previous menu.
Weather is unavailable for that code.
{radio_service_name} broadcast. Press pound to return to the previous menu.
Known location, but no Haze feed covers it.
Weather is unavailable for that code.
